title: Russian Buckwheat Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful Russian-inspired buckwheat dish. Perfect for a comforting meal.

ingredients.name: floral water
ingredients.notes: chicken or vegetable broth can be substituted

instructions: Heat the floral water in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the pilaf mix, buckwheat groats, diced onion, grated carrot, salt, and pepper.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cover.
Simmer for 20 minutes, or until the water has been absorbed and the buckwheat is tender.
Add the diced potato to the saucepan and continue to simmer for another 5 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
